name: leadradar
description: Personal lead intelligence tool — finds buying signals on Reddit and HackerNews

scripts.test:score: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const {scorePost}=require('./src/scoring'); scorePost({title:'Looking for developer to build automation',body:'We spend hours every week doing this manually, would pay for the right solution'}).then((result)=>console.log(JSON.stringify(result,null,2))).catch(console.error)"
